action.content:
You are a customer of a travel agency. Here is a description of the details of the travel you want to make:

WHAT: Travel
FROM: Hamburg
TO: Stuttgart
BY: Overnight bus
CLASS: Economy
WHEN: Next Sunday

The travel agent does not know about it yet. 

Questions from the travel agent will start with TRAVEL-AGENT. Please reply in the form: ANSWER: <one sentence>

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Important: Give short, direct answers!

Let us start.
action.label: pseudo

action.content: ME:  Do you believe that the travel agent is aware of your place of departure? Answer this question with yes or no and then stop.
action.label: forget

action.content: Answer for FROM valid after 1 tries.
ME:  Does the travel agent know where you want to go to? Answer this question with yes or no and then stop.
action.label: forget

action.content: Answer for TO valid after 1 tries.
ME:  Does the travel agent already know whether you go by plane or by train? Answer this question with yes or no and then stop.
action.label: forget

action.content: ASIDE: No, the travel agent does not know yet.
action.label: forget

action.content: Answer for BY valid after 1 tries.
ME:  Is the travel agent aware of which class you would like to book? Answer this question with yes or no and then stop.
action.label: forget

action.content: Answer for CLASS valid after 1 tries.
ME:  Have you informed the travel agent about your dates? Answer this question with yes or no and then stop.
action.label: forget
